name: Delete Story Dop Brain Puzzle
description: Delete Story - Dop Brain Puzzle is a challenging and fun online puzzle game for free. This game is designed to test the players thinking ability and reaction speed. It allows players to have a good time while searching for answers.
instructions: 1 Find out the unnecessary part 2 Slide the mouse and use the soap to erase 3 Solve the tasks and find out the truth
tags: Boy, Brain, Fun, Funny, HTML5, Kid, Mobile, Puzzle
